ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF with clear layout. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields legible. Page 1 contains the full invoice.

document_pairing.method: Certificate file (Document A page 1) paired with Invoice file (Document B page 1). Document A page 2 is an embedded copy of the invoice within the certificate file and is NOT used for verification per rule 8.5.0.
document_pairing.notes: Certificate references Project 41397. Invoice is No. 4015658, Project No 41397, issued by Nordic Pine AB to K.U. Trading Co. The certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference, but consignee (K.U. Trading Co.) and goods description match perfectly. Document A page 2 is an embedded invoice copy within the certificate file — per rule 8.5.0, this is supplementary material and is NOT used for independent verification.

criteria_met: Criterion 2: Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' can be identified in the invoice via rule 4.1.0 — same address Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden as invoice issuer Nordic Pine AB.
Criterion 3: Consignee 'K.U. Trading Co.' matches the invoice Customer field exactly.
pairing_validation.motivation: Consignee K.U. Trading Co. is explicitly identified in the invoice Customer field. Consignor address matches invoice issuer address. Pairing validation passed.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-463450' does not contain any LC banking term. Standard verification applies.

search_results.location: Document B (Invoice), page 1 — full text search
search_results.context: The exact string 'ARA Timber' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text. The invoice issuer is 'Nordic Pine AB'. However, the invoice footer shows address 'Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden' which is identical to the certificate consignor's address.

consignor_search.conclusion: The name 'ARA Timber AB' cannot be found as a text string anywhere in the invoice. The invoice is issued by 'Nordic Pine AB' at the same address (Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden).

candidates.raw_text: Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660, Karachi, Pakistan
candidates.normalized_text: Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660, Karachi, Pakistan

candidates.raw_text: Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660 Karachi, PAKISTAN
candidates.normalized_text: Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660 Karachi, Pakistan

consignor.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Nordic Pine AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'ARA Timber AB' (or normalized 'ARA Timber') anywhere in the invoice text.
comparison_steps.result: NOT_FOUND. The string 'ARA Timber' does not appear anywhere in the invoice (Document B). Invoice issuer is 'Nordic Pine AB'. No other text block contains 'ARA Timber'.
comparison_steps.outcome: Not applicable — consignor name not found in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Compare company names: Certificate 'ARA Timber AB' vs Invoice 'Nordic Pine AB'. These are entirely different company names. 'ARA Timber' and 'Nordic Pine' share no common words.
'ARA Timber AB' is not a prefix of 'Nordic Pine AB' nor vice versa.
'ARA Timber' is not a commercial abbreviation of 'Nordic Pine'.

Addresses match exactly (Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg/Gothenburg, Sweden). However, 4.1.3.4.1 critical limitation states: 'Different legal parties can share the same address — shared address without name match is NOT sufficient proof.' Certificate name 'ARA Timber AB' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The connection is solely derived from shared address, which is insufficient.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable — certificate name cannot be identified in the invoice. Shared address alone is not sufficient per 4.1.3.4.1.

comparison_steps.description: 'ARA Timber' and 'Nordic Pine' do not share a common core name. These are entirely different names.
Both use 'AB'. The difference is in the company name itself, not the legal form.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable — difference is in core name, not legal form.

comparison_steps.description: 'ARA Timber AB' is not a subset of 'Nordic Pine AB' nor vice versa. They share no common words in the name.
No shared distinctive core word between 'ARA Timber' and 'Nordic Pine'.
The names differ by multiple characters/words, not a single character.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.9 – Consignor som fakturautställare utan explicit säljaradress
comparison_steps.description: This rule requires the consignor name to be identifiable in the invoice header/branding. 'ARA Timber' does not appear in the invoice header — 'Nordic Pine AB' does. Not applicable.
Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice issuer country: Sweden (address and VAT prefix SE). Land matches.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH for country, but company name is MISMATCH.
comparison_steps.outcome: Country MATCH, but overall MISMATCH due to name.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — searched for 'ARA Timber' in all invoice text. Not found.
Juridisk part — 'ARA Timber AB' vs 'Nordic Pine AB' are completely different company names.
Critical limitation — shared address alone without name match is insufficient.
rules_applied.result: Confirmed: shared address does not override name mismatch

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'ARA Timber AB' at Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden. Invoice issuer is 'Nordic Pine AB' at Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden. The company names are completely different — they share no common words. Although the addresses are identical (same street, postal code, city), rule 4.1.3.4.1 explicitly states that shared address without name match is NOT sufficient proof that these are the same legal party. The name 'ARA Timber' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text (searched all pages per rule 4.1.0 / step 2b). Per the critical rule in 4.1.3.1 on name matching boundaries, words that differ entirely ('ARA Timber' vs 'Nordic Pine') always constitute MISMATCH. While these companies may be related (same registered address suggests possible co-location or group relationship), the rules prohibit assuming koncern relationships (4.1.3.1). Result: MISMATCH.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'ARA Timber AB' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan är utställd av 'Nordic Pine AB'. Trots identisk adress (Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg/Gothenburg, Sweden) utgör delad adress utan namnmatchning inte tillräckligt bevis för samma juridiska part enligt regel 4.1.3.4.1. Namnet 'ARA Timber' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturatexten.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: ARA Timber AB and Nordic Pine AB are the same entity or part of the same group because they share the same address.
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.1.3.4.1 explicitly prohibits deriving identity from shared address alone. Rule 4.1.3.1 prohibits assuming group/koncern relationships. The certificate name 'ARA Timber' does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: K.U. Trading Co., Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660, Karachi, Pakistan
consignee.invoice_value: K.U. Trading Co., Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660 Karachi, PAKISTAN

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has 'Customer' field (equivalent to Bill-to/Sold-to) with K.U. Trading Co. This is a primary billing field.
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing field identified: Customer = K.U. Trading Co.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'K.U. Trading Co.' — Invoice Customer: 'K.U. Trading Co.' — exact match after normalization.
Certificate: Pakistan. Invoice: PAKISTAN. Normalized: Pakistan = Pakistan.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning — Customer field is primary billing field.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'K.U. Trading Co.' at Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660, Karachi, Pakistan. Invoice Customer field: 'K.U. Trading Co.' at Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660 Karachi, PAKISTAN. Company name is an exact match. Address matches. Country Pakistan matches after case normalization. Clear MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Mottagaren 'K.U. Trading Co.' i certifikatet kan exakt identifieras i fakturans kundfält. Adress och land (Pakistan) överensstämmer.

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2 (controlled text matching).

Certificate goods: 'WHITEWOOD'. The identity-bearing designation is 'WHITEWOOD'. Invoice description: 'WW - KD WHITEWOOD'. The term 'WHITEWOOD' appears explicitly in the invoice description as an exact match (case-insensitive).

Invoice contains additional text 'WW - KD' before 'WHITEWOOD'. This is a product code/abbreviation that does not change product identity. Per 4.3.4, such additions do not cause MISMATCH when the identity-bearing designation is clearly identifiable.
comparison_steps.result: Additional text 'WW - KD' is non-identity-bearing; does not cause MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'WHITEWOOD' identified exactly in invoice.
Additional text 'WW - KD' in invoice is a non-identity-bearing code/abbreviation.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6 contains 'WHITEWOOD' as the goods description. Invoice description column contains 'WW - KD / WHITEWOOD'. The identity-bearing designation 'WHITEWOOD' is an exact match in the invoice. 'WW - KD' is an additional code that does not alter product identity per rule 4.3.4. Additional shipment details (Lot 1, containers, packages, gross weight, import permit) also match between documents, further confirming the same consignment. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Varubeskrivningen 'WHITEWOOD' i certifikatet kan exakt identifieras i fakturans varubeskrivning. Tillägget 'WW - KD' i fakturan utgör en icke-identitetsbärande produktkod.

quantity.certificate_value: 206,20 cbm (box 7); also 76 packages, Gross weight: 113 400 kgs (box 6)
quantity.invoice_value: 206,200 CBM (Quantity column); 76 packages/206,20 cbm; Gross weight:113 400 kgs

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '206,20 cbm'. This is the verification-determining quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Box 6 also contains '76 packages' and 'Gross weight: 113 400 kgs' as additional quantities.

Certificate box 7: 206,20 cbm (= 206.20 cbm). Invoice Quantity column: 206,200 CBM. Applying allowed decimal truncation: 206.200 truncated to 2 decimals = 206.20. Certificate value 206.20 = truncated invoice value 206.20. MATCH.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — 206.20 cbm verified against 206.200 CBM via truncation.

comparison_steps.description: Additional quantities from box 6: '76 packages' → invoice: '76 packages/206,20 cbm' (MATCH). 'Gross weight: 113 400 kgs' → invoice: 'Gross weight:113 400 kgs' (MATCH). No contradictions found.
comparison_steps.result: All additional quantities consistent. No contradictions.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 (206,20 cbm) is the verification-determining quantity.
Förekomstkontroll — 206.20 verified against 206.200 with decimal truncation.
Decimal truncation normalization: 206.200 → 206.20 is allowed truncation.
Additional quantities (76 packages, 113 400 kgs GW) verified — no contradictions.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '206,20 cbm'. Invoice Quantity column states '206,200 CBM'. Per rule 4.4.3 (allowed truncation of decimals), 206.200 truncated to 2 decimal places = 206.20, matching the certificate. Additionally, box 6 states '76 packages' and 'Gross weight: 113 400 kgs'. Invoice description section states '76 packages/206,20 cbm' and 'Gross weight:113 400 kgs'. All three quantities are consistent between documents, with no contradictions. Per rule 4.4.3.1, verifying at least one is sufficient, and here all three match. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Kvantiteten 206,20 cbm i certifikatets ruta 7 kan verifieras mot fakturans kvantitet 206,200 CBM (genom tillåten decimaltrunkering). Övriga kvantitetsuppgifter (76 packages, 113 400 kgs bruttovikt) överensstämmer också.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Sweden (Country of origin field); MADE IN SWEDEN (Shipping Marks)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' field. Also 'MADE IN SWEDEN' in Shipping Marks.
comparison_steps.result: Explicit origin field found: 'Country of origin: Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. After case normalization: Sweden = Sweden. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice contains 'Sweden'.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice has explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' field. After case normalization, these are identical. Additionally, Shipping Marks state 'MADE IN SWEDEN', further confirming origin. Single origin country — no mixed origins complexity. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Ursprungslandet 'SWEDEN' i certifikatets ruta 3 kan exakt identifieras i fakturans fält 'Country of origin: Sweden'.

rule_evaluation_log.description: LC-undantag — kontroll av Letter of Credit-hänvisning i certifikatet.
rule_evaluation_log.result: Not activated. No LC reference found. Certificate number 'SEG-26D-463450' does not contain LC banking terms.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Filbaserad dokumentparning — Certificate file (Document A) contains certificate on page 1 and embedded invoice copy on page 2. Invoice file (Document B) contains the independent invoice on page 1.
rule_evaluation_log.result: Applied. Verification uses Document A page 1 (certificate) and Document B page 1 (invoice). Document A page 2 (embedded invoice copy) excluded per rule.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Parningsvalidering — sanity check.
rule_evaluation_log.result: PASS. Criterion 3 met (consignee K.U. Trading Co. matches). Criterion 2 partially met (same address but different company name).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur — searched for 'ARA Timber' in all invoice text.
rule_evaluation_log.result: Not found. Name 'ARA Timber' does not appear anywhere in invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Juridisk part — 'ARA Timber AB' vs 'Nordic Pine AB' are different names.
rule_evaluation_log.result: MISMATCH — entirely different company names with no common words.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Layoutavkortning — not applicable, names not prefix of each other.
Kommersiell förkortning — not applicable, different names.
Kommersiellt namn vs registrerat bolagsnamn — same address but name not identifiable in invoice.
rule_evaluation_log.result: Not applicable per 4.1.3.4.1 — shared address without name match is insufficient.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Utelämnade organisationsord — no common core name.
Förkortning av juridisk bolagsform — both use 'AB', difference is in core name.
Saknat bolagsformsord — no common core name between 'ARA Timber' and 'Nordic Pine'.
Divisionsord — no shared distinctive core word.
Enstaka teckenavvikelse — names differ by multiple words, not a single character.
Consignor som fakturautställare utan explicit säljaradress — 'ARA Timber' not found in invoice header/branding.
Prioritetsordning consignee — Customer field identified as primary billing field.
Consignee name verification — exact match 'K.U. Trading Co.'
Consignee country — Pakistan matches.
Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning — 'WHITEWOOD' found exactly in invoice.
Non-identity-bearing addition 'WW - KD' in invoice.
rule_evaluation_log.result: Acceptable — does not change product identity.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Förekomstkontroll — 206.20 cbm verified against 206.200 CBM.
Tillåten trunkering av decimaler — 206.200 truncated to 206.20.
Ursprungsland identifiering — 'Country of origin: Sweden' explicit in invoice.
Landnormalisering — SWEDEN = Sweden after case normalization.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger avsändaren som 'ARA Timber AB' men fakturan är utställd av 'Nordic Pine AB'. Trots att båda företagen har samma adress (Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg) är det helt olika bolagsnamn och 'ARA Timber' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Övriga kontrollpunkter (mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) stämmer.
overall_assessment.summary: Consignor MISMATCH: Certificate states 'ARA Timber AB' but invoice is issued by 'Nordic Pine AB'. Same address (Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden) but different company names. Consignee, goods description, quantity, and country of origin all MATCH.
blocking_issues: Consignor mismatch: 'ARA Timber AB' (certificate) vs 'Nordic Pine AB' (invoice) — different company names, no name match found in invoice despite identical address.

consistency_check.notes: One MISMATCH (consignor) → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. All other checkpoints MATCH. Motivations are consistent with statuses.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Nordic Pine AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamnet i certifikatet ('ARA Timber AB') kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan är utställd av 'Nordic Pine AB'. Trots identisk adress (Vallgatan 27, 411 16) utgör delad adress utan namnmatchning inte tillräckligt bevis för samma juridiska part.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'ARA Timber AB' och fakturans utställare 'Nordic Pine AB' är helt olika bolagsnamn utan gemensamma ord. Namnet 'ARA Timber' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturatexten. Identisk adress räcker inte för att fastställa att det rör sig om samma juridiska part.

sections.certificate_value: K.U. Trading Co., Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660, Karachi, Pakistan
sections.invoice_value: K.U. Trading Co., Siddiq Wahab Road, Timber Market, 75660 Karachi, PAKISTAN
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn och land överensstämmer exakt efter normalisering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'K.U. Trading Co.' identifieras exakt i fakturans kundfält. Adress och land (Pakistan) stämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'WHITEWOOD' identifieras exakt i fakturan. Tillägget 'WW - KD' är en icke-identitetsbärande produktkod.
sections.motivation: Varubeskrivningen 'WHITEWOOD' i certifikatet kan exakt identifieras i fakturans varubeskrivning. 'WW - KD' är en produktkod som inte ändrar varuidentiteten.

sections.invoice_value: 206,200 CBM; 76 packages/206,20 cbm; Gross weight:113 400 kgs
sections.rule_applied: Verifieringsgrundande kvantitet 206,20 cbm (box 7) verifierad mot 206,200 CBM genom tillåten decimaltrunkering. Övriga kvantiteter konsistenta.
sections.motivation: 206,20 cbm i certifikatet verifieras mot 206,200 CBM i fakturan (206.200 trunkerat till 2 decimaler = 206.20). Även 76 packages och 113 400 kgs bruttovikt överensstämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Ursprungslandet 'SWEDEN' identifieras exakt i fakturans explicita ursprungsfält efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' överensstämmer med fakturans 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Inga motstridiga ursprungsuppgifter.

human_readable_report.overall_conclusion: NOT_IDENTICAL — Avsändaren i certifikatet ('ARA Timber AB') kan inte verifieras mot fakturans utställare ('Nordic Pine AB'). Övriga kontrollpunkter (mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) stämmer.

output_quality_checks.notes: One MISMATCH (consignor) correctly drives NOT_IDENTICAL. All MATCH checkpoints have confidence >= 0.85. Motivations are consistent with statuses.
